calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Diane Park appeared by telephone for Leslie Weinberger (Executor).

The Court questions the attorney filing service fees and whether those services ought to be the expectation of statutory fees. Ms. Park stated that the attorney service charges her office for filing of the petition and other documents that go with the original petition, that the actual costs of the filings are $885.00 ($450.00 and $435.00), that all of the other costs have to do with all of the other pleadings that had to be filed to obtain the letters testamentary and that this vendor helps them get documents filed with the Court. Ms. Park also stated that they do not want the matter to be continued so they do not have a problem with a reduction. The Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Continued To Jan-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diane Park for Leslie Fay Vermut (Petitioner) via Court Call

The Court noted there are no appearances in court to oppose this petition. Ms. Park stated that nobody has contacted them and they have not heard from Daniel. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is Granted. Bond is not required. Lost Will admitted to Probate as of today. Order signed in open court. Status on close of estate set for September 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Solarz appeared by telephone for Leslie Weinberger (Petitioner).

Mr. Solarz stated that the Petitioner is one of the Children of the Testator, that she had conversation with the Mother about the will and with the Attorney that drafted the will, that they believed the will was in existence, and that the disinherited Child has been consistently cut out for twenty years. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to March 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide evidence to set aside the statutory presumption of revocation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Continued To Feb-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
